subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who guideth whomsoever He willeth, and Who is verily the Incomparable, the All-Glorious, the Self-Subsistent. He doth verily reveal unto whomsoever He willeth whatsoever He pleaseth
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی یهدی من یشا و انه لهو الفرد العزیز القیوم یظهر لمن یشاء ما یشاء و
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
